query:
SELECT 'regulatory_sources' as tabela, COUNT(*) as registros FROM regulatory_sources
UNION ALL
SELECT 'regulatory_articles', COUNT(*) FROM regulatory_articles
UNION ALL
SELECT 'regulatory_requirements', COUNT(*) FROM regulatory_requirements
UNION ALL
SELECT 'coverage_reports', COUNT(*) FROM coverage_reports;
